issue: Unicoi County, TN GO Refunding Bonds, Srs 2025 (ULT)(NON-BQ)

extracted.issuer: Unicoi County, TN GO Refunding Bonds, Srs 2025 (ULT)(NON-BQ)

source_excerpt:
[PAGE 1]
 
  
SUPPLEMENT  
dated December 17, 2025 
to the 
OFFICIAL STATEMENT  
dated December 3, 2025 
 
relating to 
 
$7,665,000 
UNICOI COUNTY, TENNESSEE 
GENERAL OBLIGATION REFUNDING BONDS, SERIES 2025 
This Supplement, dated December 17, 2025 (this “Supplement”), supplements the attached Official 
Statement, dated December 3, 2025 (the “Official Statement”), of Unicoi County, Tennessee (the “County”) 
relating to the above-captioned bonds.  This Supplement revises certain information included in the Official 
Statement as described below.  The Official Statement, as amended and supplemented by this Supplement, 
constitutes the entire Official Statement.  The Official Statement is not amended or supplemented except 
as set forth herein.  Capitalized terms used herein and not otherwise defined have the meanings given such 
terms in the Official Statement. 
Inclusion of Fiscal Year 2025 Audited Annual Financial Report .  On December 17, 2025, the 
County’s Annual Comprehensive Financial Report for the year ended June 30, 2025 (the “Fiscal Year 2025 
Annual Financial Report”), was released  by the Division of Local Government Audit of the Office of the 
Tennessee Comptroller of the Treasury.  Included in this Supplement is an appendix with a link to the Fiscal 
Year 2025 Annual Financial Report, and such appendix shall be hereafter deemed Appendix E to the 
Official Statement.     
The Table of Contents page of the Official Statement is hereby revised to list “Annual 
Comprehensive Financial Report of the County for the Fiscal Year Ended June 30, 2025” as “Appendix E.”   
 
 
  

[PAGE 2]
 
 2 
APPENDIX E 
Annual Comprehensive Financial Report of Unicoi County, Tennessee  
for the Year Ended June 30, 2025 
The Annual Comprehensive Financial Report of Unicoi County, Tennessee, for the year ended June 
30, 2025, is available from the website of the Comptroller of the Treasury of the State of Tennessee at the 
below link and is hereby incorporated as Appendix E to the Official Statement.  To the extent there are any 
differences between the electronically posted financial statements of the County and the printed financial 
statements of the County, the printed version shall control. 
 
FY25UnicoiAFR.pdf 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
49031856.1
